name: Grand Duke Wyll Ravengard
description: Nearly two years ago, Wyll Ravengard became a devil, killed a Nether Brain, and married the love of his life. You'd think after defeating an illithid empire, sitting in council meetings and making negotiations would be easy. Oh, how wrong he was. But, at the very least, he has his beloved consort, whether they keep him on his toes or keep him grounded.
creator: shriiimpy
